summary: Excellent soundboard source capturing a legendary early‑80s show with a smoking Space > Fire and superb acoustic Bird Songs.
review: Fans rave about this recording as the best available source, noting its crystal‑clear pre‑fader mix with minimal crowd bleed. The performance is hailed as one of the era’s finest, highlighted by a powerful Space > Fire sequence and an inspired acoustic Bird Songs set featuring Brent’s irresistible keyboard work.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews are 5‑star, praising both the musical performance and the high‑quality soundboard source; only one outlier rating is negative and unrelated to the show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Praised as the best source, with very clear pre‑fader mix, minimal crowd noise and well‑balanced EQ after editing.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a landmark early‑80s performance, blending an electric set that rivals other October shows with a superb acoustic Bird Songs segment that captures the vibe of the classic ’72 era.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Summoned the vibe of the ’72 Bird Songs; his playing is highlighted as integral to the show’s magic.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland delivers irresistible keyboard work, especially during the acoustic Bird Songs.
